items.briefing:
Attackers are actively exploiting Fortinet firewall vulnerabilities in ongoing "FortiBleed" attacks, turning compromised devices into tools that steal login credentials — Australian organisations using Fortinet products should ensure patches are applied immediately. Separately, Google has filed a lawsuit against a Chinese phishing network sending fake SMS messages, a reminder that scam texts remain a real threat to Australian staff and customers.

In positive news, members of the Scattered Spider hacking group have pleaded guilty, helping disrupt a gang responsible for major corporate breaches globally.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet firewalls, check with your IT team today that firmware is fully up to date.

featured.title: Google sues Chinese phishing network over fake texts
featured.quote: Google sues Chinese phishing network targeting millions of Australian Android users with fake texts.
